en.name: Level 28 — Final Virtue
en.shortDescription: Windswept grasslands under permanent overcast around a medieval castle, where a sentient black tar slowly creeps in from the mountains.
en.atmosphere: Melancholic and desolate; a blue glow lights empty fields where a lone armored figure holds back an advancing darkness.
en.tips: Avoid the tar-like abyss at all costs. The Blue Knight is friendly but clingy. Lightning strikes hourly in predictable zones.
